intended_use: syngo Dynamics is a multimodality, vendor agnostic Cardiology image and information system intended for medical image management and processing that provides capabilities relating to the review and di
intended_use_full: syngo Dynamics is a multimodality, vendor agnostic Cardiology image and information system intended for medical image management and processing that provides capabilities relating to the review and digital processing of medical images. syngo Dynamics supports clinicians by providing post image processing functions for image manipulation, and/or quantification that are intended for use in the interpretation and analysis of medical images for disease detection, diagnosis, and/or patient management within the healthcare institution's network.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction; cardiac function assessment in cardiology
ground_truth: Method of Disks (MOD) / Modified Simpson's Rule, established independently by 2 experienced sonographers without access to Auto EF results
other_metrics: Pearson correlation coefficient r = 0.822 (subject device) vs. 0.826 (predicate device); biplane EF results obtained in 93.3% of cases (subject) vs. 92.0% (predicate); bias -0.2% absolute EF; absolute biplane EF delta ≤10% in 87.9% of cases (subject) vs. 83.7% (predicate)
